title: helichrysum × fontqueri
intro: Helichrysum × fontqueri, a hybrid plant belonging to the daisy family, is a cross between Helichrysum stoechas and Helichrysum melitense. Known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, this plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum × fontqueri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, resulting in various health benefits such as pain relief, improved wound healing, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and can also be added to creams and salves for topical use.
